name: walkojas-boop/jsonshelf
description: Deterministic JSON repair, validation, example-generation, and schema-coercion API for AI agents. Zero LLM calls, sub-10ms, $0.0005 per call. Agent-only service with well-known discovery (ai-plugin.json, mcp.json, llms.txt), programmatic API key issuance, prepaid credits with autonomous payment flow, and x402 stablecoin support. Live at https://jsonshelf.vercel.app/.
